rationale: Educ. Code §8.005 addresses the tax status of regional education service centers and their employees, paralleling school districts. It does not reference or depend on the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: A regional education service center and its employees are subject to or exempt from taxation in the same manner as a school district and school district employees.
_note: No textual or operational conflict identified; the rule concerns entity-level tax status, not homestead exemption amounts.
